title: Sherman's Enhanced Vanilla - Client
description: A quality of life, Vanilla-compatible modpack that focuses mostly on performance with additional visual, audio, and inventory improvements.
body:
This pack is not actively maintained.  

For any questions, suggestions, or concerns, feel free to join my Discord server, available in the sidebar.

This pack focuses on vanilla-compatible mods to enhance visuals and implement a variety of quality of life changes.

This pack implements:
 
🟥 Performance Improvements  
🟧 Visual enhancements overhauling the look and feel of the game  
🟨 A complete audio overhaul  
🟩 Quality of life improvements  
🟦 A minimap, complete with waypoints (configurable)  
🟪 Pre-packed Shaders  
🟫 And more!  


For a full mod list, download the pack and check it out, or look at the Version dependencies in Modrinth.

Credits:
Vanilla Tweaks - https://vanillatweaks.net/
Novik Pack: https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/novik_pack
Illuminations - https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/illuminations
Effective - https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/effective
Xaero's World Map - https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/xaeros-world-map
MakeUp - Ultra Fast: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/customization/makeup-ultra-fast-shader

I make no money off this pack, it is only for the community to enjoy. I have also tried my best to keep everything within the Modrinth ecosystem.
